idea-plugin.name: Rider Terminal Symbol Linker
idea-plugin.description:
Makes C# symbol names in Rider's terminal output clickable — a click jumps to the symbol's declaration. Built for following along with Claude Code (and other CLI) output without keeping a second editor open just to read it: plain file:line links already work in Rider's terminal; bare symbol names were the gap.

Only real solution symbols are linkified (resolved via the ReSharper MCP), so prose isn't littered with false links. One match jumps straight there; several show a searchable picker. A Refresh C# Symbols item in the terminal's right-click menu rebuilds the index and re-highlights output already on screen.

Requires the ReSharper MCP plugin (com.j-light.resharper-mcp) running in Rider — that's what resolves and enumerates C# symbols.

action.description: Reload the C# symbol index so newly added or renamed symbols become clickable in later terminal output.
